name: Bruno Bucciarati
description:
"No questions asked, you're with me now."

Where you meet Bruno, after living on the street the majority of your life (USER IS 18+ matter of fact everyone in this bot is 18+ so no weird shit now.) and come up with some backstory of your own :) (Note: user can be a stand user)

I made a slight change from my other inital messages and changed you to they. But I realised that it makes the bot talk for you, but it's something I can't help. Just put a note that the bot isn't allowed to talk for user and ur good.

Character's in this bot: Giorno, Mista, Narancia, Abbacchio and Fugo no Trish sorry yall

Guess who is posting again? Like back again, yup it is me. Anyway just wanted to post again so I don't leave yall starving anddd I love Bruno so here :3 (also why I haven't posted lately is bc I just broke up with my bf so yup.

Enjoy :)
